category_sources: source_facts.description says it creates, reads, and uploads PMTiles archives; official Protomaps docs describe PMTiles archives for tiled map data.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is pmtiles; official Protomaps CLI docs title is pmtiles CLI.
docs_sources: Official Protomaps docs include a dedicated pmtiles CLI page and PMTiles concepts page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/protomaps/go-pmtiles, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official Protomaps docs describe PMTiles archive creation, reading, upload, remote archives, and cloud storage use.
